a:r.a:t: The deck is backed by runnable architecture, not only concept slides
OpenAPI routes for KPI, readiness, coverage, quality issues and Phase 2 configuration APIs.
Postgres + Keycloak + API + E2E tests with schema and seed auto-load.
promote flows for quality gates and Phase 2 impact analysis.
Phase 1 S6 tables/views plus Phase 2 configuration, BOM, effectivity and change tables.
Keycloak realm, JWT validation and role-gated promote actions.
Integrated FastAPI static serving for gate report and planning visibility.
The current executable package proves API-first contracts, security and gate patterns. Naval Assurance adapters, evidence lineage and operations calibration are the proposed pilot extension.
Meeting objective: agree the executable baseline, then approve the bounded Continuous Naval Assurance pilot extension.
